zh.lifeSummary: 當Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene於1233年出生在法國布列塔尼時，她的父親Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol49歲，母親Havoïse de Dinan44歲。她於大約1255年與Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫吉加普享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene于1233年出生在法国布列塔尼时，她的父亲Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol49岁，母亲Havoïse de Dinan44岁。她于大约1255年与Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫吉加普享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English (originally French)   Beaufort  . It is found mainly among African Americans. Compare   Bluford  .

variants.name: Bluford
meanings: Possibly also English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place. The name occurs in records of the 19th century but is now extinct in the British Isles.
Variant of   Blueford  , a surname of English (ultimately French) origin. It is found mainly among African Americans.

variants.name: Beaufort
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Beaufort . The surname Beauford is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Clémence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

en.lifeSummary: When Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene was born in 1233, in Brittany, France, her father, Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol, was 49 and her mother, Havoïse de Dinan, was 44. She married Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan about 1255. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1263, in Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene est née en 1233, à Bretagne, France, son père, Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Havoïse de Dinan, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan environ 1255. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1263, à Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene 1233 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol 49 und ihre Mutter Havoïse de Dinan 44. Sie hat um 1255 Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1263 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene è nata il nel 1233 nel Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Havoïse de Dinan, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan circa 1255. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1263, nel Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayeneが1233年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dolは49歳，母Havoïse de Dinanは44歳であった。約1255年にAlain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーグインガンップで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene(이)가 1233년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Havoïse de Dinan(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1255년 Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 길그가프에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene nasceu em 1233, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Havoïse de Dinan, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan aproximadamente 1255. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1263, em Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene родилась в 1233 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Havoïse de Dinan, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan около 1255 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1263 г. в местности гуингамп, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clémence de Beaufort, Vicomtesse de Dinan, Baronesse de Mayene nació en 1233, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Senechal Alain De Beaufort de Dol, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Havoïse de Dinan, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Alain II d'Avaugour Baron de Mayenne, Vicomte de Dinan aproximadamente 1255. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1263, en Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 30 años.
